# HausPower

HausPower is a licensed electrical contractor located in Kitchener-Waterloo, Ontario, Canada. The company specializes in premium electrical solutions for luxury residential homes, combining expert safety standards with advanced smart home technology.

## Services
- Custom Electrical Installations (precision wiring for luxury homes)
- Smart Home Integration (lighting controls, security systems, home automation)
- Panel Upgrades
- Generator Installations
- Renovation Wiring (electrical systems for existing structures)
- New Construction Wiring

## Providers
- Matt Allen, Licensed Master Electrician, ECRA #7018055. Decades of experience in high-end residential electrical work.

## Credentials
- ECRA License #7018055
- ESA (Electrical Safety Authority) compliant
- Fully licensed and insured

## Service Area
Kitchener-Waterloo and surrounding Ontario communities, including Guelph, Cambridge, Waterloo Region.

## Contact
Phone: (519) 635-2078
Email: hello@hauspower.ca
Instagram: https://instagram.com/smarthaus.ca
Address: Kitchener-Waterloo, Ontario, Canada
